prompt: A high-resolution surreal photographic mosaic: hundreds of small square panels arranged into a single large panel. Each small panel contains a tiny slanted plane or stripe leaning up toward the right, clearly implying a local upward slope. But the tiles are composed so that the overall mosaic silhouette curves and leans down toward the right, producing a clear opposite global slope. Minimalist color palette, strong directional studio lighting, shallow depth of field, cinematic contrast, precise geometric composition, photoreal + conceptual, no text, no numbers, highly detailed, 1024px+ short side.
visual_logic: Many small panels tilt upward locally while their global arrangement forms a large tilt in the opposite direction, causing local and global trends to contradict.
